creator: john@jmarshall.id.au
text:
Makefile has PORTVERSION 0.11
distinfo has 0.10

Fix: Update port's distinfo to match the Makefile.
How-To-Repeat: 
Attempt to build the port

===>  License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
=> Net-ManageSieve-0.11.tar.gz is not in /build/ports/mail/p5-Net-ManageSieve/distinfo.
=> Either /build/ports/mail/p5-Net-ManageSieve/distinfo is out of date, or
=> Net-ManageSieve-0.11.tar.gz is spelled incorrectly.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /build/ports/mail/p5-Net-ManageSieve.
